title: Geotechnical Student Organization
Geotechnical Student Organization
text:
About GSO
The Geotechnical Student Organization is a student-run organization at the University of Maine focused on hands-on learning, professional development, and building a strong community in geotechnical engineering.

title: Donate
text: Your donation helps support members directly by funding workshops, professional development events, guest speakers, conference travel, and outreach activities.

title: Donate
